_comment: Gameplay tuning file for cat laser-play behaviors. Note: strict JSON has no native comments, so explanatory text is stored in *_comment fields and ignored by the loader.

catch_radius._comment: Defines when the laser is considered close enough to be a 'catch attempt'. Used by engagement/challenge logic and catch-sensitive transitions.
catch_radius.base_scale_comment: Base multiplier for (cat.width + cat.height). Higher = larger catch radius overall.
catch_radius.min_radius_comment: Absolute lower bound in pixels for computed catch radius.
catch_radius.max_radius_comment: Absolute upper bound in pixels for computed catch radius.
catch_radius.confidence_norm_offset_comment: Confidence value mapped to 0.0 in normalization.
catch_radius.confidence_norm_scale_comment: Normalization width; larger means confidence effects are gentler.
catch_radius.confidence_scale_base_comment: Base radius multiplier at low normalized confidence.
catch_radius.confidence_scale_gain_comment: Additional radius multiplier gained at high normalized confidence.
catch_radius.near_dist_diag_scale_comment: Distance (in bbox diagonals) considered 'near' for catch-radius scaling.
catch_radius.far_dist_diag_scale_comment: Distance (in bbox diagonals) considered 'far' for catch-radius scaling.
catch_radius.distance_scale_base_comment: Base radius multiplier when laser is farther from cat.
catch_radius.distance_scale_gain_comment: Extra multiplier as laser gets closer to cat.
catch_radius.clamp_min_comment: Final hard minimum for catch radius after all scaling.
catch_radius.clamp_max_comment: Final hard maximum for catch radius after all scaling.

algorithms._comment: Per-algorithm motion style controls. Director/challenge logic still modulates these at runtime.

common.speed_norm_divisor_comment: Cat speed (px/s) mapped near 1.0 for speed-driven decisions.

oval._comment: Oval orbit around cat center; often used for tease/chase baseline behavior.
oval.margin_scale_comment: Scales base oval radius from cat box dimensions.
oval.rx_min_comment: Minimum base X radius before arc/challenge scaling.
oval.rx_max_comment: Maximum base X radius before arc/challenge scaling.
oval.ry_min_comment: Minimum base Y radius before arc/challenge scaling.
oval.ry_max_comment: Maximum base Y radius before arc/challenge scaling.
oval.scaled_min_comment: Minimum final oval radius after all scaling.
oval.scaled_max_comment: Maximum final oval radius after all scaling.

near_miss._comment: Near-miss tease bursts: fast circular dodges just outside catch radius, followed by short pauses.
near_miss.trigger_base_comment: Base per-second probability to start near-miss tease when allowed.
near_miss.low_engagement_threshold_comment: Below this engagement level, near-miss trigger probability gets boosted.
near_miss.radius_min_comment: Lower near-miss radius scale multiplier relative to catch radius.
near_miss.radius_max_comment: Upper near-miss radius scale multiplier relative to catch radius.
near_miss.pause_min_base_comment: Base lower bound (sec) for near-miss pause interval.
near_miss.pause_min_gain_comment: Extra lower-bound pause time when catch success is low.
near_miss.pause_max_base_comment: Base upper bound (sec) for near-miss pause interval.
near_miss.pause_max_gain_comment: Extra upper-bound pause time when catch success is low.

stare_dart._comment: Hold-and-dart pattern: laser pauses (stare) then darts to new positions.
stare_dart.hold_min_sec_comment: Short hold lower bound when entering stare-dart from oval.
stare_dart.hold_max_sec_comment: Short hold upper bound when entering stare-dart from oval.
stare_dart.long_hold_min_sec_comment: Main hold lower bound used during ongoing stare-dart cycles.
stare_dart.long_hold_max_sec_comment: Main hold upper bound used during ongoing stare-dart cycles.
stare_dart.low_speed_threshold_comment: If normalized cat speed is below this, oval may switch into stare-dart.
stare_dart.low_speed_dart_prob_comment: Base probability factor for low-speed oval -> stare-dart transition.

zigzag._comment: Approach-shake-retreat pattern for high-energy chase sequences.
zigzag.front_y_offset_comment: Front-point offset from cat top (fraction of cat height).
zigzag.front_reach_threshold_px_comment: Distance threshold to switch from approach to shake.
zigzag.retreat_reach_threshold_px_comment: Distance threshold to switch from retreat to return.

confidence_fallback._comment: Detector-confidence conditioned behavior fallback. Lower confidence => calmer, wider, less twitchy motion.
confidence_fallback.speed_scale_min_comment: Minimum speed scale at very low confidence.
confidence_fallback.speed_scale_gain_comment: Speed scale increase as confidence rises.
confidence_fallback.arc_scale_gain_comment: Arc expansion factor at low confidence (larger arcs reduce apparent jitter).
confidence_fallback.hold_scale_gain_comment: Extra hold duration at low confidence.
confidence_fallback.dart_scale_min_comment: Minimum dart/transition aggressiveness at low confidence.
confidence_fallback.dart_scale_gain_comment: How much dart aggressiveness increases with confidence.
confidence_fallback.transition_scale_base_comment: Base transition probability scaling at low confidence.
confidence_fallback.transition_scale_gain_comment: Additional transition scaling at high confidence.
confidence_fallback.zigzag_duration_low_conf_gain_comment: Extra zigzag shake duration multiplier under low confidence.
